pages.title: Foundations
pages.description: Brain biology, synaptic structure, Hebbian learning, LTP/LTD, astrocytes, and the tripartite synapse.

pages.title: Neuron Models
pages.description: Computational models of neurons — Hodgkin-Huxley, integrate-and-fire, FitzHugh-Nagumo, AdEx, Izhikevich, and dendritic computation.

pages.title: Plasticity
pages.description: Synaptic plasticity rules — STDP, BCM theory, metaplasticity, rate-based and timing-based learning.

pages.title: Cultures & MEA
pages.description: Neuronal cultures, multi-electrode arrays, burst dynamics, closed-loop stimulation, and network learning in vitro.

pages.title: Memristors
pages.description: Memristor theory, circuit models, SPICE simulation, memristive systems, and the fourth circuit element.

pages.title: RRAM Devices
pages.description: Resistive RAM, oxide switching, filament formation, sneak currents, crossbar arrays, and in-memory computing.

pages.title: Neuromorphic Hardware
pages.description: Neuromorphic chips and systems — Loihi, TrueNorth, SpiNNaker, Neurogrid, analog VLSI, and silicon neurons.

pages.title: Network Dynamics
pages.description: Neural oscillations, gamma and theta rhythms, synchrony, Hopfield networks, and cortical dynamics.

pages.title: Connectomics
pages.description: Connectome mapping, graph-theoretic analysis, C. elegans, Drosophila, and the human connectome project.

pages.title: Cortex Physiology
pages.description: Place cells, grid cells, mirror neurons, visual cortex, and auditory processing. How cortical circuits perform specific computational tasks.

pages.title: Extra & Emerging
pages.description: Ferroelectric synapses, organic neuromorphic devices, hybrid SNN architectures, AER systems, and frontier topics.
